example: Every passenger must show a ticket before boarding the train.
exampleCn: 每位乘客上火车前都必须出示车票。

example: He has an odd habit of talking to himself.
exampleCn: 他有个自言自语的古怪习惯。

example: Workers laid a new cable under the sea last month.
exampleCn: 工人们上个月在海底铺设了一条新电缆。

example: We flew to Paris via London yesterday.
exampleCn: 我们昨天经由伦敦飞往巴黎。

example: Reporters worked hard to expose the truth behind the scandal.
exampleCn: 记者们努力揭露丑闻背后的真相。

example: She writes a weekly column for the local newspaper.
exampleCn: 她为当地报纸撰写每周专栏。

example: He likes coffee with milk and a little cream.
exampleCn: 他喜欢加牛奶和少许奶油的咖啡。

example: She gives part of her salary to charity every month.
exampleCn: 她每个月都把一部分工资捐给慈善机构。

example: The army defended the territory against foreign invasion.

example: The colony finally won its independence after years of struggle.

example: Water turns into a solid when it freezes.
exampleCn: 水结冰时会变成固体。

example: Sleep plays a crucial role in keeping us healthy.

example: She never shares her inner feelings with strangers.
exampleCn: 她从不向陌生人透露内心的感受。

example: The car manufacturer recalled thousands of vehicles for safety checks.

example: We will celebrate her birthday with a big party.

example: You need a permit to park in this area.

example: Similarly, students must follow the rules of the library.

example: He works for a large corporation in New York.
exampleCn: 他在纽约一家大公司工作。

example: The tenant pays rent on the first day of each month.
exampleCn: 房客每月一号交房租。

example: She showed great talent for music at an early age.

example: High inflation makes food and housing more expensive.

example: This soup has a rich and pleasant taste.

example: Trust is fundamental to any healthy relationship.

example: Virtually every home in the city has internet access now.

example: The film has a strong cast of famous actors.

example: Be careful, that knife has a very sharp edge.
exampleCn: 小心，那把刀的刃非常锋利。

example: The dress fits her perfectly in every way.

example: It is unusual to see snow in this warm city.

example: He likes to quote famous writers in his speeches.

example: I tried to convince her to accept the job offer.

example: A few large companies dominate the global phone market.

example: The children are learning addition and subtraction at school.

example: The river forms a natural boundary between the two countries.

example: She is a creative designer full of fresh ideas.

example: The street was filled with gay music and laughter.

example: He had to abandon the car in the deep snow.

example: The city plans to construct a new bridge next year.

example: Students enjoy walking around the beautiful campus in spring.

example: The formation of good habits takes time and patience.

example: Hundreds of runners will compete in the city marathon.

example: The bank records every transaction made by its customers.

example: The two neighbors had a dispute over the garden fence.

example: The police began an inquiry into the cause of the fire.

example: Her grandfather was an immigrant who arrived with nothing.

example: The old king ruled his kingdom with wisdom and kindness.

example: It is illegal to drive without a valid license.

example: Teachers value daily interaction with their students.

example: Careful preparation is the key to passing the exam.

example: She teaches history at a local secondary school.

example: Each side of the square is one metre long.

example: The journalist traveled abroad to report on the war.
exampleCn: 这名记者远赴海外报道战争。

example: The company decided to dismiss several workers last week.

example: His voice was full of deep emotion as he spoke.

example: She asked the teacher for an extension on her essay.

example: He won first prize in the national writing contest.
exampleCn: 他在全国写作比赛中获得一等奖。

example: Don't drag the heavy box across the wooden floor.
exampleCn: 别在木地板上拖那只沉重的箱子。

example: The old mill by the river still grinds wheat today.
exampleCn: 河边的老磨坊至今还在磨麦子。

example: Few people possess the courage to admit their mistakes.

example: The restaurant has a good reputation for fresh seafood.

example: This old painting is extremely valuable to collectors.

example: The Roman empire once ruled most of Europe.

example: He studied philosophy at university for four years.

example: The doctor was pleased with the patient's quick recovery.

example: Students must submit their essays by Friday afternoon.

example: My grandfather is seventy years old but still very active.
exampleCn: 我爷爷七十岁了，但仍然非常活跃。

example: The old books were covered with a layer of dust.
exampleCn: 旧书上覆盖着一层灰尘。

example: She does voluntary work at the hospital every weekend.
exampleCn: 她每个周末都在医院做志愿工作。

example: Young children cannot always distinguish right from wrong.
exampleCn: 幼儿并不总能分清是非。

example: He put on a warm jacket before going outside.
exampleCn: 出门前他穿上了一件暖和的夹克。

example: The inspector checked every room in the new building.
exampleCn: 检查员检查了新楼里的每个房间。

example: A tiny creature was hiding under the wet rock.
exampleCn: 一只小生物藏在湿漉漉的岩石下。

example: Women constitute more than half of the company's workforce.
exampleCn: 女性占公司员工总数的一半以上。

example: Many workers lost their jobs during the economic recession.
exampleCn: 经济衰退期间，许多工人失去了工作。

example: Experts work hard to prevent teenage suicide.
exampleCn: 专家们努力预防青少年自杀。

example: Most people in this region depend on agriculture for a living.
exampleCn: 这个地区的大多数人靠农业为生。

example: The program needs more input before it can give results.
exampleCn: 这个程序需要更多输入才能给出结果。

example: She received numerous letters from her fans every week.
exampleCn: 她每周都收到粉丝的大量来信。

example: The scientists found a strange substance in the water.
exampleCn: 科学家在水中发现了一种奇怪的物质。

example: The manager will arrive shortly, so please wait here.
exampleCn: 经理很快就到，请在这里稍候。

example: Dogs have a keen sense of smell.
exampleCn: 狗的嗅觉十分敏锐。

example: He has a deep passion for classical music.
exampleCn: 他对古典音乐怀有深厚的热爱。

example: Each volunteer worked four hours at the food bank.
exampleCn: 每位志愿者在食物银行工作了四个小时。

example: The pasta tastes better with some tomato sauce.
exampleCn: 加点番茄酱，意面更好吃。

example: Initially, the plan seemed too expensive to most members.
exampleCn: 起初，这个计划对多数成员来说似乎太昂贵了。

example: The priest blessed the young couple at the church.
exampleCn: 神父在教堂为这对年轻夫妇祝福。

example: The intense heat forced everyone to stay indoors.
exampleCn: 酷热迫使所有人待在室内。

example: The storm cut off electricity across the whole town.
exampleCn: 暴风雨切断了全镇的电力供应。

example: Drivers face a heavy penalty for using phones while driving.
exampleCn: 开车时使用手机的司机将面临重罚。

example: Great teachers inspire their students to chase big dreams.
exampleCn: 优秀的教师激励学生追逐远大的梦想。

example: You can adjust the chair to fit your height.
exampleCn: 你可以调整椅子以适合你的身高。

example: My father plans to retire at the age of sixty.
exampleCn: 我父亲打算六十岁退休。

example: She found a temporary job for the summer holidays.
exampleCn: 她找到了一份暑期临时工作。

example: The mountain top is clearly visible on a sunny day.
exampleCn: 晴天时山顶清晰可见。

example: He wore a blue baseball cap to block the sun.
exampleCn: 他戴着一顶蓝色棒球帽遮挡阳光。

example: The new system greatly improved the factory's efficiency.
exampleCn: 新系统大大提高了工厂的效率。

example: To be frank, I don't like this design at all.
exampleCn: 坦率地说，我一点也不喜欢这个设计。

example: The phone market is highly competitive these days.
exampleCn: 如今手机市场竞争非常激烈。

example: She studied drama and dreamed of acting on stage.
exampleCn: 她学习戏剧，梦想登台表演。

example: He shared his wealth with schools and hospitals.
exampleCn: 他把财富分享给学校和医院。

example: Climbers reached the snowy peak just before sunset.
exampleCn: 登山者在日落前登上了积雪的山峰。

example: She gave a clear presentation about the new product.
exampleCn: 她对新产品做了一次清晰的介绍。

example: Call me whenever you need help with your homework.
exampleCn: 无论何时功课需要帮助，都可以打电话给我。

example: Her face turned pale when she heard the bad news.
exampleCn: 听到坏消息时，她的脸变得苍白。

example: The new laboratory has the most advanced equipment.
exampleCn: 新实验室拥有最先进的设备。

example: The flood was the worst disaster in the city's history.
exampleCn: 这次洪水是该市历史上最严重的灾难。

example: I owe you twenty dollars for the concert ticket.
exampleCn: 音乐会门票的钱我还欠你二十美元。

example: Sunny weather always puts me in a good mood.
exampleCn: 晴朗的天气总能让我心情愉快。

example: The sky gradually turned dark as the storm approached.
exampleCn: 随着暴风雨临近，天空逐渐变暗。

example: Small fishing boats rested quietly in the calm bay.
exampleCn: 小渔船静静地停泊在平静的海湾里。

example: Good lighting can enhance the beauty of a room.
exampleCn: 良好的照明能提升房间的美感。

example: The detective finally solved the mystery of the missing ring.
exampleCn: 侦探终于解开了戒指失踪之谜。

example: The charity helps families living in extreme poverty.
exampleCn: 这个慈善机构帮助生活在极端贫困中的家庭。

example: She worked hard and earned a promotion to manager.
exampleCn: 她努力工作，获得晋升当上了经理。

example: This old watch is his most precious possession.
exampleCn: 这块旧手表是他最珍贵的财产。

example: Teachers evaluate student progress at the end of each term.
exampleCn: 老师在每学期末评估学生的进步。

example: The dove is a symbol of peace around the world.
exampleCn: 鸽子在世界各地都是和平的象征。

example: She received a certificate after finishing the training course.
exampleCn: 完成培训课程后，她获得了一张证书。

example: Giving red envelopes is an old custom during Chinese New Year.
exampleCn: 春节发红包是一项古老的习俗。

example: The new monitor shows the patient's heart rate clearly.
exampleCn: 新监护仪清晰地显示病人的心率。

example: The hotel offers live music and other entertainment every evening.
exampleCn: 这家酒店每晚提供现场音乐和其他娱乐表演。

example: Each coffee bean is carefully selected by hand.
exampleCn: 每一颗咖啡豆都经过精心手工挑选。

example: The two countries formed an alliance to protect trade.
exampleCn: 两国结成联盟以保护贸易。

example: The committee will give an evaluation of the project next week.
exampleCn: 委员会下周将对该项目进行评估。

example: The commander ordered his troops to hold the position.
exampleCn: 指挥官命令部队坚守阵地。
